text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the end of summer camp draws near, the
students are attending a night walk as part of
their recreational activities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While officially called a night walk, it's more of a
"fright night" in practice. I've come along to keep
watch of everyone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I g-guess nighttime frights go hand 'n' hand
with summer... S-sounds like fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Specters or ghouls, whatever—I can handle 'em
all!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whatta dumb question! Izzat some kinda
joke?! Nothin' scares the mighty Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: This'll be a piece of cake, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Student Organizer
text_block_list.text:
All right, once you've drawn your partner from
the box, make your way to the designated area!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's partner turns out to be Tamamo
Cross—a gutsy runner born and raised in Kansai
who's been steadily climbing the ranks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like Inari One, her cheerful demeanor makes her
rather dependable to others. However...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whazza matter, Tama? You gettin' scared or
somethin'? Gonna go cryin' home to Mommy?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: O-oh please! We all know you're gonna be the one cryin'! I can already see ya shakin' under the covers!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Gimme a break! You're not foolin' anyone
with the way your legs are tremblin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Ya hear that waver in your voice?! You won't
last a second and ya know it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Grrrr!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Grrrr!
choice_data_list: Sounds to me like you're both scare—

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text:
What wazzat?!
What was dat?!

text_block_list.name: Student Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and Inari One, you're up next. Bon
voyage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their faces still look a little tense. Maybe there's
something I can suggest to ease their nerves...
choice_data_list: Screaming can help you forget about the fear.
No shame in speed walking through it all.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
S-sounds like advice Tama could use! You're
always yellin' anyway, so why not let 'er rip?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! Try listenin' to yourself! You're the one
screamin' all the time! Go on and quit holdin'
back—I'll cover my ears!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they begin their rowdy trek into the
night...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well! This is just what the doctor
ordered! A nice relaxin' walk in the healin'
ambience of nature!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
R-right with you on that one! Sooo quiet and
relaxin'! Yep... My heart feels at ease—

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Hyeee!

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle, crack!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whazza matter with you?! Stop squealin' like
a crazy person!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're da one who sounds like you're gonna
cry!

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: AAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The hell?! Why ya gotta scream so loud?! I knew
you were a big ol' fraidy-cat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aw, shut it! You're da one makin' me go deaf! I swear, bein' around scaredy-cats like you's bad for my health!

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle... WHOOOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... W-we finally made it outta there...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I thought I was gonna lose my voice...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell no one 'bout what happened tonight?
Cool.
Don't tell nobody 'bout what happened tonight?
Cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the quiet of the night, Inari One and Tamamo
Cross share a secret summer memory.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I bet you'd like that, wouldn't ya, Tama?
Go ahead, set the pace and I'll follow along! Ya
can thank me later!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Speak for yourself! You should thank me for chasin' after you when ya eventually get lost tryna escape!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they begin their rowdy trek into the
night...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well! This is just what the doctor
ordered! A nice relaxin' walk in the healin'
ambience of nature!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
R-right with you on that one! Sooo quiet and
relaxin'! Yep... My heart feels at ease—

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Hyeee!

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle, crack!

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whazza matter with you?! Stop squealin' like
a crazy person!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're da one who sounds like you're gonna
cry!

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
H-hehe... It's okay. I know ya wanna make a run
for it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Quit tryna sound tough! You're itchin' to
split, I can tell!

text_block_list.name: Obscure Noise
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle... WHOOOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm completely... worn out...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... That mighta been da fastest I ever ran...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari & Tamamo
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell no one 'bout what happened tonight?
Cool.
Don't tell nobody 'bout what happened tonight?
Cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the quiet of the night, Inari One and Tamamo
Cross share a secret summer memory.
